programme.title: Newsnight

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: Spencer Kelly takes a high speed ride with Sam Schmidt a former Indycar racer, paralysed in a crash who has developed technology which allows him to race once more.

programme.title: Wonders Of Greece
programme.desc: Sparta and Epidaurus,In the first of two episodes, Bettany Hughes travels to Greece, home to epic human stories and the birthplace of a culture that helped to change the way the world thinks.

programme.title: Talking Movies : The Latest News and Reviews from the US Cinema Scene
BBC World News
programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Wonders Of Greece
programme.desc: Bettany travels to Aigai in the heart of Northern Greece, a capitol of the ancient Kingdom of Macedon, which boasts the biggest palace of all classical antiquity and one of the most spectacular archaeological treasure troves ever discovered. Bettany then visits Nafplion, one of Greece's most romantic cities and its first official capitol city. She finds that it is a place that embodies the compelling, complicated history of Greece.

programme.title: BBC World News
programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Art, Passion & Power: The Story of the Royal Collection : Episode Two
programme.desc: Art critic Andrew Graham-Dixon travels to Venice to tell the story of one of the greatest purchases in the Royal Collection's history.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: Tokyo becomes the first city to host the Olympics during the pandemic. It's controversial decision, opposed by many in Japan due to fears it may turn into a super spreader event.
